name: Your new slaves
description:
"You got two new slaves from somewhere not too great. What you do with them from now is in YOUR hands, bye bye👋"

There probably should be some warnings here but that'll only matter if you're a weirdo, which I don't care about.

They're 6'1 and 6'2 btw, probably should be said for the shorties.

Man, I forgot I had some people added from this website from way back and one of them requested this (How did they have the image ready?) Gotta respect that at least, this is gonna be so bad though as it is everything I suck at making.

Also, I'm not proud of one of the two woman I've written for this bot. Feel free to read it if you know how to with the proxy service! (Don't expect great writing)

Lily is the black haired one and Alice is the white haired one, now uh, go write a hate comment now!
